title: LIVE World Cup. Defeats for Red Devils’ opponents: Harry Kane beats New Zealand, Egypt fall to Brazil

news.title: LIVE World Cup. Defeats for Red Devils’ opponents: Harry Kane beats New Zealand, Egypt fall to Brazil

world.title: LIVE World Cup. Defeats for Red Devils’ opponents: Harry Kane beats New Zealand, Egypt fall to Brazil

environment.compositionIntent: Pale paper-white gallery shell with Davis hard-edge relief pressure: cool blue facets press against orange/red beams, black construction contours, open rings, and diagonal fracture lines.

contrast.notes: Warm paper light preserves the pale ground; a restrained cool rim separates blue/teal planes and black contour anchors from orange pressure facets.

guidance: Use for painted, paper, canvas, ink wash, graphite, stain, and transfer surfaces.
Represent texture through declarative surface controls and WebGPU-safe texture descriptors.
Use for all-over color fields, hard-edged planes, atmospheric bands, and flat graphic fields.
Prefer geometry layers or declarative texture descriptors over GLSL gradients.
Use for soft atmosphere, dust, floating pigment, and particulate halos.
Keep the particle logic deterministic and inspectable in data.
Use for WebGPU-safe color grading and output transforms.
Do not use legacy GLSL post passes for WebGPU project scenes.

params.compositionUse: Rooted as the enclosing pale Davis-style field so the radial fan, diagonal beams, and scuffed paper shell surround the camera without moving the instanced/field origin.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected advisory concept reference image: pale ground, hard geometric facets, open ring/radial pressure, diagonal beams, black contour lines, and scuffed pigment density were used as broad guidance only.
Static validation succeeded for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with no errors.
Preview attempt 2 succeeded and captured desktop screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-world-environment-draft-desktop.jpg.

Screenshot shows a dominant enclosing pale Davis-style environment with radial/open-ring fan, blue/orange/red against-pressure split, diagonal beams, black construction contours, and instanced pigment specks replacing the rejected point field.
Render report healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, nonBlankRatio 0.999996, dynamicRange 247.667, paintedCoverageRatio 0.508683.
Generated module package report for attempt 2 is webgpu-compatible with forbiddenSurfaces empty; the previous points-geometry-missing-uv failure is repaired.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: real dominant world-environment module repaired for WebGPU packaging and supported by Playwright preview evidence.
compositionAdaptations: Rooted as the enclosing pale Davis-style field so the radial fan, diagonal beams, and scuffed paper shell surround the camera without moving the instanced/field origin.
Accepted moduleRef, role, and assetRefs were preserved from context.acceptedParts for WebGPU-compatible final assembly.
Kept at root [0,0,0] with scale 1 as the enclosing pale Davis-style environment shell.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults

params.compositionUse: Kept near the canonical vanishing point but pulled slightly back and left so the open ring and Against blue/orange junction stay readable over the environment instead of becoming a centered solid object.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available local concept-reference image directly as advisory-only broad palette/value/mood evidence: pale paper ground, geometric relief blocks, central open ring, radial blue/red fans, diagonal beams, black contour lines, and scattered paint incidents.
Static check-part-draft succeeded for drafts/non-literal-fracture-pressure.module.mjs with validation.pass true and no errors.
Playwright preview attempt 2 succeeded for desktop with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a readable Ronald Davis-style abstract pressure system: enlarged open polygonal ring, opposing cool blue and warm orange/red radial fans converging at a measured Against junction, corner anchors, diagonal beams, black construction contours, and concentrated pigment marks.
Attempt 2 render report metrics: nonBlankRatio 1, dynamicRange 220.667, foregroundOccupancyRatio 0.206445, centerCoverageRatio 0.760877.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: the final draft is a real WebGPU-targeted Three.js module using standard material surfaces, with preview-backed readability for the Ronald Davis non-literal fracture pressure signal.
compositionAdaptations: Kept near the canonical vanishing point but pulled slightly back and left so the open ring and Against blue/orange junction stay readable over the environment instead of becoming a centered solid object.
Accepted moduleRef, role, and assetRefs were preserved from context.acceptedParts for WebGPU-compatible final assembly.
Placed near the canonical vanishing point at [-0.08,0.08,-1.95], scale 1.34, renderOrder 4, preserving the open ring and blue/orange Against junction.
composition modified non-literal-fracture-pressure from isolated accepted-part defaults

params.compositionUse: Reduced and shifted into the right/rear midground as a contour, chip, and facet texture layer; it adds Davis surface agitation while leaving the central void and primary radial pressure visible.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected loose concept reference image directly; used it only for broad pale paper ground, hard-edge radial geometry, blue/teal/orange accents, black contour density, and scuffed surface mood.
Static check succeeded for drafts/artist-mark-field.module.mjs with validation.pass true and no errors.
Attempt 2 Playwright preview succeeded with screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-artist-mark-field-draft-desktop.jpg and render report previews/attempt-002/desktop-render-report.json.
Attempt 2 render report healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, dynamicRange 248.333, foregroundOccupancyRatio 0.206024, centerForegroundRatio 0.751082.

Attempt 2 screenshot showed a broad pale painted support plane with distributed Ronald Davis hard-edge cuts, open radial marks, black construction contours, blue/teal/orange/red pressure facets, and sprayed pigment chips; it reads in isolation and carries the non-literal Against fracture pressure without literal subject matter.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted after revision. The final draft is a real WebGPU-safe Three.js module using standard materials, instanced geometry, radial facets, construction lines, and deterministic seed-derived variation.
compositionAdaptations: Reduced and shifted into the right/rear midground as a contour, chip, and facet texture layer; it adds Davis surface agitation while leaving the central void and primary radial pressure visible.
Accepted moduleRef, role, and assetRefs were preserved from context.acceptedParts for WebGPU-compatible final assembly.
Reduced and shifted to [2.6,-0.05,-5.15], scale 0.54, so dense contour marks support the field without burying the central void.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
